description: Composition:Grey round neck t-shirt with graphic on the frontWash care:1. Light machine wash 2. Do not bleach 3. Warm iron on reverse 4. Do not dry clean 5. Dry flat/reverse 6. Do not scrubFittings:Comfort FitGandhism is always in. Wear this grey tee from inkfruit with a white graphic to show the world that you still beleive in Gandhian ideals. Team this up with jeans for night-outs with friends, trips to the mall or a stroll in the park and spread the message of peace. Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5'11” ft, Shoulders-18"
